title: arikury schizophylla
intro: Arikury schizophylla, also known as the Tooth fungus or Split-gill fungus, is a type of edible mushroom that belongs to the family Schizophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of Arikury schizophylla include its high content of antioxidants and its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of consuming this mushroom include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Arikury schizophylla is typically prepared as a herbal tea or used in traditional medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
